name: @deemwar/mochallama
description: Run a local llama.cpp LLM from the terminal — JVM-powered (Project Panama FFM), shipped as a self-contained jlink runtime image. macOS x64 only for v0.1.0.
author: deemwar <io@deemwar.com>
//os-cpu-note: v0.1.0 bundles a macOS x64 jlink image (native llama.cpp dylibs are darwin-x86_64). The os/cpu fields below make npm refuse installs on unsupported platforms instead of silently shipping a broken binary. Additional platforms will publish as separate image bundles later.
